cards.front: If I ___ (have) more money, I ___ (buy) a house.
cards.back: If I had more money, I would buy a house.
cards.example: Unreal: I don't have more money.

cards.front: If I ___ you, I would study more.
cards.back: If I were you, I would study more.

cards.front: If she ___ (know) the answer, she ___ (tell) us.
cards.back: If she knew the answer, she would tell us.
cards.example: Past in if, would + base in result.

cards.back: If I had wings, I would fly.

cards.front: If I ___ (not/have) to work, I ___ (sleep) all day.
cards.back: If I didn't have to work, I would sleep all day.

cards.front: What ___ you ___ (do) if you won the lottery?
cards.back: What would you do if you won the lottery?

title: Condicional Correcto
description: Match the sentence with its type of conditional.

pairs.left: If it rains, I'll stay home.
If I had wings, I'd fly.
If I were rich, I'd travel.
If you heat ice, it melts.
If I had time, I'd go.

sentences.prompt: If I had more money, I would buy a house:
sentences.correct: If I had more money, I would buy a house

sentences.prompt: If I were you, I would study more:
sentences.correct: If I were you, I would study more

sentences.prompt: If she knew the answer, she would tell us:
sentences.correct: If she knew the answer, she would tell us

sentences.prompt: If I didn't have to work, I would sleep all day:
sentences.correct: If I didn't have to work, I would sleep all day

title: Quiz: Second Conditional
description: Demonstrate your mastery of the second conditional.

questions.question: "If I ___ more money, I would buy a car."
"If I ___ you, I would study more."
questions.explanation: Use "were" for all subjects in conditionals.

questions.question: Which is Second Conditional?
options: If it had rained, I'd have stayed.

questions.question: "If I ___ (not/have) to work, I would travel."
"What would you do if you ___ the lottery?"

title: Quiz: Second Conditional Listening
description: Listen and choose the correct answer.

items.audioText: Unreal: I don't have more money
items.question: What did you hear?
options: Unreal: I don't have more money
If I ___ you, I would study more.
Past in if, would + base in result
items.explanation: You heard: "Unreal: I don't have more money".

items.question: What did you hear?
options: Unreal: I don't have more money
If I ___ you, I would study more.
Past in if, would + base in result
items.explanation: You heard: "Were for all subjects (not was)".

items.audioText: If I ___ you, I would study more.
items.question: What did you hear?
options: If I ___ you, I would study more.
Unreal: I don't have more money
Past in if, would + base in result
items.explanation: You heard: "If I ___ you, I would study more.".
